---
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
toc: false
---

::: {.section-head}
<p class="section-crumb">~/builds/</p>

# Builds

<p class="section-subtitle">Shipped products and applied-ML case studies. Each one optimises for engineering discipline — APIs, deployment, evaluation, monitoring — alongside the model work.</p>
:::

```{=html}
<div class="project-list">

<a class="project-card" href="https://github.com/tyagiprerna0808/pragya-nursery-platform" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
<div class="project-card-head">
<div class="project-tags"><span class="project-tag">e-commerce</span><span class="project-tag">capacitor</span><span class="project-tag">paytm</span><span class="project-tag">vercel + render</span></div>
<span class="status-badge status-shipped">shipped</span>
</div>
<h3 class="project-title">Pragya Nursery — live ordering platform</h3>
<p class="project-description">A real ordering platform for my father's plant nursery in Greater Noida. Vercel website, Render API, Capacitor Android app, Paytm payments, geofenced delivery within 15 km, persistent order storage, CI-deployed on every push to master. Live customers, real revenue.</p>
</a>

<a class="project-card" href="https://github.com/tyagiprerna0808/ml-applied-depth" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
<div class="project-card-head">
<div class="project-tags"><span class="project-tag">embeddings</span><span class="project-tag">retrieval</span><span class="project-tag">quarto</span></div>
<span class="status-badge status-wip">wip</span>
</div>
<h3 class="project-title">ml-applied-depth — companion code for this blog</h3>
<p class="project-description">From-scratch implementations of the building blocks of modern AI, paired with every post. Notebooks + experiments + assignment scaffolds so readers build each component themselves before reading the worked version.</p>
</a>

<a class="project-card" href="https://github.com/tyagiprerna0808/credit-risk-studio" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
<div class="project-card-head">
<div class="project-tags"><span class="project-tag">ml pipeline</span><span class="project-tag">fintech</span><span class="project-tag">dashboards</span></div>
<span class="status-badge status-shipped">shipped</span>
</div>
<h3 class="project-title">Credit Risk Studio</h3>
<p class="project-description">End-to-end ML pipeline case study with feature engineering, model selection, calibration, and a dashboard front end. Built as a portfolio piece demonstrating production-grade credit-risk modeling.</p>
</a>

<a class="project-card" href="https://github.com/tyagiprerna0808/fraud-detection-monitor" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
<div class="project-card-head">
<div class="project-tags"><span class="project-tag">production api</span><span class="project-tag">docker</span><span class="project-tag">fraud</span></div>
<span class="status-badge status-shipped">shipped</span>
</div>
<h3 class="project-title">Fraud Detection Monitor</h3>
<p class="project-description">Production-style fraud API with health/readiness endpoints, Docker workflow, baseline benchmark artifacts, and observability hooks. Built like a real service, not a notebook.</p>
</a>

<a class="project-card" href="https://github.com/tyagiprerna0808/fintech-github-showcase/tree/main/personalized-marketplace-search" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
<div class="project-card-head">
<div class="project-tags"><span class="project-tag">retrieval</span><span class="project-tag">ranking</span><span class="project-tag">hybrid search</span></div>
<span class="status-badge status-shipped">shipped</span>
</div>
<h3 class="project-title">Personalized Marketplace Search</h3>
<p class="project-description">Hybrid retrieval (sparse + dense) with cross-encoder reranking, offline metrics, and an API serving layer. Built like a production relevance system rather than a one-off notebook.</p>
</a>

<a class="project-card" href="https://github.com/tyagiprerna0808/treasury-forecast-lab" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
<div class="project-card-head">
<div class="project-tags"><span class="project-tag">time series</span><span class="project-tag">forecasting</span></div>
<span class="status-badge status-shipped">shipped</span>
</div>
<h3 class="project-title">Treasury Forecast Lab</h3>
<p class="project-description">Forecasting workflow demonstrating time-series modeling, evaluation, and practical decision support for treasury operations.</p>
</a>

<a class="project-card" href="https://github.com/tyagiprerna0808/portfolio-optimizer-lab" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
<div class="project-card-head">
<div class="project-tags"><span class="project-tag">optimization</span><span class="project-tag">quantitative</span></div>
<span class="status-badge status-shipped">shipped</span>
</div>
<h3 class="project-title">Portfolio Optimizer Lab</h3>
<p class="project-description">Optimization and quantitative modeling case study for decision support, with reproducible experiments and clean APIs.</p>
</a>

</div>
```
